creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
I agree about 64-bit SML NJ being ideal, almost to the point where I want to get involved with SML/NJ development.  It's not clear to me if even the newest SML/NJ (110.76) from upstream is fully 64-bit.

I recently tried porting Isabelle 2013-2 to FreeBSD, using PolyML, and I am running into a lot of errors that I previously saw in the current version.  I don't understand why polyml needs such a big environment in Isabelle, or why Isabelle has such a complex build process.  Twelf by comparison was very easy to build.
